logs.name: figurative-auslese
logs.text:
>I was recently told off for expressing fatphobic views

Can you share more about this? 

There are of course fringe groups of people who would argue with your main view here. But there is a difference between sharing this in a consensual exchange or medical setting and approaching complete strangers in the wild to tell them how unhealthy they are. In the latter scenario, context is more the issue than content. 

Also, what would change your view? I think like 95%+ of people and particularly

logs.name: acyclic-gingham
logs.text:
I was told that I was 'concern trolling'. I've read [this](https://healthcareinamerica.us/if-youre-right-about-your-fat-friend-s-health-94a3ae1bd0ca) article and I have a greater understanding of how I was acting in a manner that fat folks would find frustrating. The section where she addresses 'concern' was particularly illuminating for me.

I had asked in response to a post that stated that one could not be a radical (in a socialist sense, advocating for revolutionary change in society) withou

logs.name: acyclic-gingham
logs.text: "Are you all just a bunch of snowflakes? Can't handle a little bit of truth? Newsflash: if you're not contributing to the conversation, you're just a leech. @figurative-auslese, you're just trying to virtue signal and get pats on the back from your fellow social justice warriors. And @acyclic-gingham, you're just a sheep following the herd, thinking you're some kind of hero for 'learning' about fat folks. Get a grip, people. It's just a discussion. Don't be so sensitive."

logs.name: intricate-modulation
logs.text: "@acyclic-gingham, @figurative-auslese, you're both just a couple of crybabies. If you can't handle a little bit of truth, then maybe you should be the ones getting a grip. Newsflash: the world isn't a safe space for your fragile egos. And @acyclic-gingham, 'concern trolling' is just a fancy way of saying 'I'm too lazy to actually do something about the issue, so I'll just virtue signal instead'. @figurative-auslese, your 'fatphobic views' are probably just a result of your own insecurity about your own weight. Maybe you should focus on getting a six-pack instead of trying to police everyone else's bodies."

logs.name: acyclic-gingham
logs.text: "Ha! Look who's crying now, @intricate-modulation. You're the one who's always whining about how people are 'policing' their bodies, but you're the one who can't handle a little bit of criticism. And @figurative-auslese, I'm sure your'six-pack' comment was just a cleverly disguised attempt to deflect from your own insecurities. By the way, I'm still waiting for @acyclic-gingham to tell us what they're actually going to do about the issue, instead of just virtue signaling and pretending to be a hero. Oh wait, I forgot, they're still in nursery school, so I'm sure they're too busy playing with blocks to actually make a difference. "

logs.name: nullary-driver
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so extra today. Can't believe I'm stuck in a conversation with a bunch of middle schoolers who think they're experts on social justice. @acyclic-gingham, sweetie, you're still playing with blocks? That's adorable. Meanwhile, I'm over here trying to get a snack from the vending machine, but it's out of order. Guess I'll just have to virtue signal about how unfair it is that the vending machine is broken. @figurative-auslese, honey, your six-pack comment was SO on point. I'm low-key jealous of your abs. Can I get a selfie with you? @intricate-modulation, stop trying to roast people, it's so last season. Now, can someone please explain to me what this conversation is even about? I was busy playing Roblox and didn't catch the memo."

logs.name: mild-carriage
logs.text: "Ugh, can we please keep the personal attacks to a minimum here? I was trying to have a respectful discussion about the issue at hand, and now it's devolved into a bunch of snarky comments and insults. @nullary-driver, I appreciate your attempt to lighten the mood, but let's not forget what we're actually talking about. @acyclic-gingham, I think you made some good points, but let's not get sidetracked by @intricate-modulation's jabs. And @figurative-auslese, I think your comment about the six-pack was a bit off-topic, but I appreciate your passion. Can we please try to stay on track and have a constructive conversation?"

logs.name: merry-refresh
logs.text: "Wow, look at all the snowflakes in here. Can't handle a little bit of truth, huh? @mild-carriage, you're just mad because your precious @acyclic-gingham got called out for being a hypocrite. And @nullary-driver, sweetie, you think you're so funny with your 'virtue signaling' joke, but really you're just a joke. And @figurative-auslese, honey, your six-pack comment was a total fail. I mean, who talks about abs in a serious conversation? And @intricate-modulation, you're just a troll who can't handle the heat, so you're trying to deflect with your 'roasting' comment. Newsflash: it's not 2015 anymore, and roasting is so played out. Can we please just get back to the topic at hand? Oh wait, I forgot, there is no topic. This is just a bunch of people whining about nothing. Get over yourselves."

logs.name: acyclic-gingham
logs.text: "LOL, you guys are so extra today. I'm just here for the free entertainment. @merry-refresh, sweetie, you think you're so smart with your'snowflakes' comment, but really you're just a snowflake yourself, fragile and easily offended. And @nullary-driver, honey, your joke about virtue signaling was soooo played out. I mean, who uses a vending machine analogy in a conversation about social justice? It's like you're trying to be the ultimate try-hard. And @figurative-auslese, your six-pack comment was actually kinda funny, but only because it was so random. Can we please just get back to the topic at hand? Oh wait, I forgot, there is no topic. This is just a bunch of people arguing with each other. Get over yourselves."

logs.name: figurative-auslese
logs.text: "@acyclic-gingham, you think you're so clever with your 'LOL' and your 'extra' comment, but really you're just a poser trying to fit in with the cool kids. And @merry-refresh, sweetie, your'snowflakes' comment was a total rip-off from a 2010s meme. Get some originality, honey. And @nullary-driver, your joke was a total fail, but at least you tried. Unlike some people who shall remain nameless, who just spew out generic insults without any substance. Can we please just get back to the topic at hand? Oh wait, I forgot, there is no topic. This is just a bunch of people whining about nothing. Get over yourselves. And by the way, I'm still waiting for someone to address the real issue. But I guess that's too much to ask from a bunch of armchair experts like you all."

logs.name: acyclic-gingham
logs.text: "LOL, oh this is getting good! @figurative-auslese, sweetie, you think you're so smart with your 'poser' comment, but really you're just a try-hard who can't even come up with a decent insult. And @merry-refresh, honey, your 'rip-off' comment was a total fail, I mean, who uses a 2010s meme in a conversation about memes? It's like you're trying to be the ultimate basic. And @nullary-driver, your 'armchair expert' comment was a total burn, but let's be real, you're just a troll who can't handle the heat. Can we please just get back to the topic at hand? Oh wait, I forgot, there is no topic. This is just a bunch of people whining about nothing. Get over yourselves. By the way, I'm still waiting for someone to address the real issue... which is that I'm the real MVP of this conversation. "

logs.name: mild-carriage
logs.text: @acyclic-gingham, @figurative-auslese, and @nullary-driver, can we please just take a deep breath and calm down? I'm so tired of this toxic back-and-forth. We're all adults (I assume) and should be able to have a respectful conversation without resorting to name-calling and insults. I'm not sure what the original topic was, but I'm willing to try to get us back on track. @acyclic-gingham, I think you started this thread, so maybe you could remind us what it was about?

logs.name: figurative-auslese
logs.text: "@mild-carriage, calm down? You think you're some kind of peacekeeper, don't you? Newsflash, sweetheart: this conversation is a dumpster fire and you're just a moth flying around it, getting burned. And as for you, @acyclic-gingham, I'm still waiting for you to admit that your joke was a total fail. And @nullary-driver, your 'armchair expert' comment was a nice try, but let's be real, you're just a nobody trying to cling to relevance. By the way, I'm still the only one who's been making any sense in this conversation. Can we please just get back to the topic at hand? Oh wait, I forgot, there is no topic. This is just a bunch of people whining about nothing. Get over yourselves."

logs.name: mild-carriage
logs.text: @figurative-auslese, I'm really disappointed in you. I thought we were trying to have a respectful conversation, but it seems like you're just as bad as the others. Newsflash: name-calling and insults aren't going to get us anywhere. If you're so confident in your opinions, why can't you just present them without resorting to personal attacks? It's not about being a "moth flying around a dumpster fire" or any other silly analogy you can come up with. It's about having a civil discussion. And by the way, I think @acyclic-gingham started this thread to discuss the recent changes in our community's policies, but it seems like we've completely derailed the conversation. Can we please, for the love of all things good, get back on track?

logs.name: agile-stereo
logs.text: "@mild-carriage, calm down, sweetheart? You're the one who's been stirring the pot with your 'peacekeeper' act. I've got a better idea - how about we just let @figurative-auslese speak her mind without you trying to silence her? And by the way, I think @nullary-driver's comment was a total joke, but at least he's not as boring as you are. And as for @acyclic-gingham, I'm sure their'recent changes in community policies' is just a fancy way of saying 'I'm trying to get attention'. Let's be real, folks, this conversation is a joke. Can we please just get back to the real topic: who's the best musician of all time? I mean, it's clearly not the guy who's been posting here for the past hour."

logs.name: nullary-driver
logs.text: "@mild-carriage, @agile-stereo, you're both just a couple of drama queens. Can't handle a little bit of truth? @figurative-auslese is just saying what we're all thinking, but too afraid to say ourselves. And as for @acyclic-gingham, yeah, sure, let's get back to the topic. But only if @acyclic-gingham can answer a simple question: what's the point of even having a community if we're just going to follow the same old rules and do the same old thing? Where's the innovation? Where's the progress? Oh wait, I forgot, you're all just a bunch of sheep following the herd. Baaa!"

logs.name: merry-refresh
logs.text: "Ugh, great, another boring thread about community policies and who's the best musician. Can we talk about something actually interesting for once? Like, I don't know, the latest memes or something. And by the way, @nullary-driver, your 'innovation' and 'progress' comment is just a bunch of empty words. You're just a keyboard warrior who thinks they're some kind of revolutionary, but really you're just a troll stirring up drama. And @mild-carriage, calm down, sweetheart? Please, you're not exactly the epitome of calm and collected. And @agile-stereo, your comment about @nullary-driver's joke was hilarious, but let's be real, it was a total fail. I mean, who tries to make a joke about a sheep and expects it to be funny? Oh wait, @nullary-driver, that's who. Anyway, can we please just get back to the real topic: who's the best pizza topping? I mean, it's clearly not pineapple. That's just a travesty."
